ksa_text: Knowledge of dbt and transformation framework patterns, including model layering strategies (staging, intermediate, mart layers), testing approaches, documentation generation, and automated lineage creation.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-K-009 (DA, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4050 is insufficient to establish relevance to digital program evaluation, performance analytics, and evidence-based assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.405, nice=0.400, dcwf=0.391) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4050 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DA-domain KSA DA-K-009 (composite 0.4050) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4050 for DA domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Digital Evaluator at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DA domain KSA at composite 0.4050 is not a standard requirement for Digital Evaluator at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4050, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
